calendar.matters:
Notice Of Hearing On First Amended Petition For Approval Of Transfer Of Structured Settlement Payment Rights
Off Calendar Aug-04-2025 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances (by Zoom):
John Shafai, Esq, 310-466-4282 for Plaintiff.
Chad Pace, Esq. 775-237-3557 Tallac Law for Respondent.
Martin Shives, Esq.619-889-4720 Summers & Shives for Berkshire Hathaway Life Insurance Company of Nebraska.
Arleen Salonga, 510-830-6960, Payee

Argued. Mr. Pace makes a general appearance for the Payee. Petitioner's counsel John Shafai argues. Mr. Pace responds. Ms. Salonga addresses the court. Mr. Shives presents argument. The Court directs counsel to email the amended settlement agreement.

9:38am Court is in recess.

10:00am Back in session. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

PETITIONER TBT SERVICES, LLC Notice Of Hearing On First Amended Petition For Approval Of Transfer Of Structured Settlement Payment Rights.

Petitioner TBT Services LLC's First Amended Petition For Approval Of Transfer Of Structured Settlement Payment Rights is Granted.

Order is signed. Transfer Agreement as amended on 7/22/25 and declaration of John Z. Shafai are filed.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (302/JMQ)

Notice Of Hearing On First Amended Petition For Approval Of Transfer Of Structured Settlement Payment Rights
Off Calendar Jul-29-2025 Continued To Aug-04-25 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:

No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PETITIONER TBT SERVICES, LLC's Hearing On First Amended Petition For Approval Of Transfer Of Structured Settlement Payment Rights.

Continued to August 4, 2025 on the court's own motion.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn; Clerk: M. Macadangdang; Not Reported. (302/JMQ)

Notice Of Hearing On Petition For Approval Of Transfer Of Structured Settlement Payment Rights
Off Calendar Jul-02-2025 Off Calendar
